Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Analyze the Data Structure: Columns: CaseID, Activity, Timestamp, LocalResident, CommunityGroup, PreliminaryScore, ScoreAdjustment, ManualReview, Decision, Resource. Cases: C001 to C005. Process Flow: ApplicationReceived -> DataValidation -> PreliminaryScoring -> ManualReview -> FinalDecision. Key Variables: LocalResident: TRUE/FALSE. CommunityGroup: Specific name or None. PreliminaryScore: base score. ScoreAdjustment: modifier. Decision: Approved/Rejected.

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Examine Each Case Individually: Case C001: Resident TRUE, Group Highland Civic Darts Club, Score 710 +10 to 720, Approved. Case C002: TRUE, None, 720 +0 to 720, Approved. Case C003: FALSE, None, 715 +0 to 715, Rejected. Case C004: TRUE, Highland Civic Darts Club, 690 +10 to 700, Approved. Case C005: FALSE, None, 740 +0 to 740, Approved.

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Identify Patterns: Observation 1 Community Adjustment: C001 and C004 have Highland Civic Darts Club, both get +10 points. C002 C003 C005 have None, get 0 adjustment. Implication: Membership grants scoring advantage.

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Observation 2 Rejection Threshold: C004 approved at 700, C003 rejected at 715. Hypothesis: Hidden threshold or LocalResident deciding factor. Refined: Not just LocalResident since C005 FALSE approved.

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Check LocalResident: C001 True 720 Approved, C002 True 720 Approved, C003 False 715 Rejected, C004 True 700 Approved, C005 False 740 Approved. C003 outlier. Closer look C003 vs C004: C004 lower base 690 gets +10 to 700 approved, C003 715 rejected.

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Conclusion: Decision logic not solely on Final Score. Community adjustment lowers bar for club members. Non-club face stricter bar. Bias: Affiliation grants points over raw score.

Name: Ethical or Moral Reasoning - PE
Text: Synthesize: Bias Type Affinity Bias Social Capital Bias. Impact: C004 lower base than C003 but approved, C003 rejected. Penalizes without community affiliation. Implications: Excludes qualified non-members.

Name: Counterfactual Reasoning - IND
Text: Refining: If threshold 710: C003 should pass but failed, C004 should fail but passed. If 720: C004 should fail but passed. Implies tiered threshold based on CommunityGroup.
